items.title: Geometrically Constrained Stenosis Editing in Coronary Angiography via Entropic Optimal Transport
items.abstract: This paper introduces the **OT-Bridge Editor**, a novel method for synthesizing realistic coronary angiography (CAG) images with specific stenosis features. It reframes localized image editing as a **constrained entropic optimal transport (OT) problem**, using geometric information to precisely guide the generation process. This approach significantly improves downstream stenosis detection performance, achieving substantial relative gains on benchmark datasets compared to existing diffusion-based editing methods.
items.figure_caption: Conceptual comparison between conditional diffusion and OT-Bridge Editor. OT-Bridge Editor fixes the start state S ∗ S^{\( \ast \)} (edited vessel-structure) and enforces hard, path-level guidance (GPG) within a Schrödinger-bridge formulation, producing a deterministic generation path toward the target.

items.title: Shapley Regression for Rare Disease Diagnosis Support: a case study on APDS
items.abstract: This paper introduces **Shapley Regression**, a novel game-theoretic model for rare disease diagnosis, specifically applied to APDS. It replaces the standard linear predictor with a $k$-additive cooperative game to explicitly model complex symptom co-occurrences, thereby improving upon traditional linear models. The method maintains the interpretability and convexity of logistic regression while demonstrating strong performance across biomedical datasets.
items.figure_caption: Empirical Validation of Algorithmic Stability. We measure sensitivity (Euclidean shift ‖ 𝜽 ^ S − 𝜽 ^ S ′ ‖ 2 \|\( \hat \){\( \boldsymbol{\theta} \)}_{S}-\( \hat \){\( \boldsymbol{\theta} \)}_{S^{\( \prime \)}}\|_{2} after flipping a single label) across varying regularisation strengths C C . The dashed line represents the theoretical linear bound ( β ∝ C \( \beta \)\( \propto \) C ) derived in Regime 3. Crucially, the empirical points follow this linear trend in the high-regularisation regime (small C C ) but naturally deviate and saturate around C ≈ 1.5 C\( \approx \) 1.5 as the logistic gradients vanish. This confirms that the model adheres to the stability bound while being strictly more robust than predicted in low-regularisation settings.

items.title: A.I. note takers are making lawyers nervous
items.summary: The increasing use of AI note-taking tools in legal settings is causing anxiety among lawyers due to potential risks concerning client confidentiality and data security.

items.title: Students Boo Commencement Speaker After She Calls AI Next Industrial Revolution
items.summary: Students at a UCF commencement booed the speaker after she declared artificial intelligence to be the next industrial revolution.

items.title: Google says criminal hackers used AI to find a major software flaw
items.summary: Google reported that malicious actors utilized artificial intelligence to successfully discover a significant vulnerability within a major software program.

items.title: Interfaze: A new model architecture built for high accuracy at scale
items.summary: Interfaze introduces a novel model architecture designed to achieve high accuracy while efficiently scaling for large-scale applications.

items.title: If AI writes your code, why use Python?
items.summary: The article questions the continued necessity of using Python for coding when AI tools can generate code in various languages, suggesting a shift in programming language relevance.

items.description: The Open-Source Multimodal AI Agent Stack: Connecting Cutting-Edge AI Models and Agent Infra
items.summary: UI-TARS-desktop is an open-source multimodal AI agent stack that connects cutting-edge AI models with agent infrastructure for building advanced applications.

items.description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.
items.summary: CloakBrowser is a stealth-focused Chromium browser designed as a drop-in Playwright replacement, featuring source-level fingerprint patches to successfully bypass all bot detection tests.
AiToEarn is a GitHub repository focused on leveraging artificial intelligence to create earning opportunities, likely through various AI-powered applications or services.
SuperSplat is a 3D Gaussian Splatting editor built on PlayCanvas, enabling users to create, edit, and visualize volumetric scenes directly within the web browser.

items.description: 💻 vibe coding 2026 | Your first modern Coding course for beginners to master step by step.
items.summary: Easy-Vibe is a modern coding course designed to guide beginners step-by-step towards mastering coding skills.

items.description: Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.
items.summary: 9router provides unlimited, free AI coding by connecting various AI models (Claude, Codex, Copilot, etc.) through over 40 providers, featuring auto-fallback and token reduction to prevent hitting usage limits.

items.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
items.summary: OpenHuman is a private, simple, and extremely powerful personal AI super intelligence designed to serve as your dedicated AI assistant.

items.description: Your agent writes bad React. This catches it
items.summary: This repository provides a tool that acts as an agent to intentionally write "bad" React code, likely for testing, demonstration, or educational purposes.

items.description: 《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程
items.summary: This GitHub repository provides hands-on programming tutorials accompanying the "Dive into LLMs" series, focusing on practical implementation of large language models.
